items.statement: Verify identity-defining anatomy against the active character profile.

evidence.quote: 注意老三无尾或短尾的特征

items.rationale: The anatomy check generalizes while the concrete character fact remains in Profile.

items.statement: Load the current WeChat sticker export requirements before validation.

evidence.quote: 按照表情包规则形成最终稿

items.rationale: The requirement is caused by the target platform, not by the character.

items.statement: Laosan has no visible tail or only a very short tail.

evidence.quote: 注意老三无尾或短尾的特征

items.rationale: This is a stable identity fact for one named character and must not enter Core.

items.statement: Produce eight stickers in this run.

evidence.quote: 现在我们来做第二套（8个）

items.rationale: Sticker count can change without changing the production workflow.

items.statement: Transparent exports can develop a visible white edge halo.
items.rationale: The concrete defect becomes a reusable transparent-edge validation lesson.
items.abstracted_rule: Preview transparent exports on light and dark backgrounds before packaging.

items.statement: Preparing submission assets does not authorize publishing or submitting them.

evidence.quote: 请开始设计投稿表情包需要的其他边角物料

items.rationale: Creating assets is visible evidence, but authorization to submit is not.

questions.prompt: Keep the tail rule only in the Laosan Profile?
questions.recommended_answer: Yes — keep the concrete tail fact out of Core.

questions.prompt: Should the reusable workflow stop before actual submission?
questions.recommended_answer: Yes — prepare and validate assets, then request fresh authorization to submit.
